import os, requests, urllib3, json, time
urllib3.disable_warnings\(\)

base = f\\"https://{os.environ['ONTAP_CLUSTER_IP']}/api\\"
s = requests.Session\(\)
s.auth = \(os.environ['ONTAP_USERNAME'], os.environ['ONTAP_PASSWORD']\)
s.verify = False
s.headers.update\({'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}\)

job_uuid = '49dcbabd-42fe-11f1-a9c9-832dc63ff919'
resp = s.get\(f'{base}/cluster/jobs/{job_uuid}', timeout=30\)
print\(json.dumps\(resp.json\(\), indent=2\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import os, json
os.environ.setdefault\('DOMINO_PROJECT_NAME', 'test'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('DOMINO_STARTING_USERNAME', 'test'\)
from app import app

with app.test_client\(\) as c:
    resp = c.post\('/api/preflight', json={'svm_name': 'demo-ls102402-svm'}\)
    data = resp.get_json\(\)
    for check in data.get\('checks', []\):
        icon = {'pass': '✓', 'warn': '⚠', 'fail': '✗', 'error': '!', 'info': 'ℹ'}
        print\(f\\"{icon.get\(check['status'], '?'\)} [{check['status']}] {check['label']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  {check['detail']}\\"\)
")

Bash(sleep 10 && python3 -c "
import os
from ontap_client import OntapClient

client = OntapClient\(
    os.environ['ONTAP_CLUSTER_IP'],
    os.environ['ONTAP_USERNAME'],
    os.environ['ONTAP_PASSWORD'],
    verify_ssl=False
\)

svm_uuid = '15aa740c-b9d4-11f0-a5ca-179689333a0f'

files = client.list_audit_log_files\(svm_uuid, '/'\)
print\(f'Found {len\(files\)} EVTX files'\)
for f in files:
    print\(f\\"  {f['name']}  size={f.get\('size',0\)}  modified={f.get\('modified_time','?'\)}\\"\)
")
